title: Brownie Buena
description: A nutty and flaky Argentinean dessert dish featuring dark brown soft sugar that is high-protein-friendly, perfect for sick-day indulgence.
instructions: Melt butter and dark brown sugar together in a saucepan over medium heat until smooth. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract, all-purpose flour, and chopped nuts.
In another bowl, beat high-protein eggs until frothy. Add them to the melted mixture and mix well.
Pour the batter into a greased 8x8 inch baking dish. Sprinkle with unsweetened cocoa powder evenly over the top.
Bake for about 25-30 minutes or until golden brown around edges and center is set.
